name: Pecan Rice Melange
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse wild rice.
2. Combine wild rice with 2-1/2 cups chicken broth. Heat to boiling.
3. Cover and reduce heat, simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Drain excess broth and set aside.
5. Heat remaining 2-1/2 cups chicken broth and butter to boiling.
6. Add long grain rice. Reduce heat and simmer covered for 15 minutes.
7. Combine the rices.
8. Toss with parsley and pecans.
